ddls:
CREATE TABLE "classes" (
  "class_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each class */,
  "class_name" TEXT /* Name of the class */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the class */,
  "namespace" TEXT /* Namespace of the class */,
  "is_abstract" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is abstract */,
  "is_final" INTEGER /* Indicates if the class is final */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the class */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the class */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "members" (
  "member_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each member */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class the member belongs to */,
  "member_name" TEXT /* Name of the member */,
  "member_type" TEXT /* Type of the member (method or data) */,
  "access_modifier" TEXT /* Access modifier of the member (public, protected, private) */,
  "return_type" TEXT /* Return type of the method */,
  "is_static" INTEGER /* Indicates if the member is static */,
  "is_virtual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is virtual */,
  "is_override" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method overrides a method from a base class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the member */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_members_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inheritance" (
  "inheritance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inheritance relationship */,
  "parent_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the parent class */,
  "child_class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the child class */,
  "is_interface" INTEGER /* Indicates if the inheritance is from an interface */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the inheritance relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the inheritance relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inheritance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inheritance_child_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("child_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inheritance_parent_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_control" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access control rule */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (read, write, execute) */,
  "is_inherited" INTEGER /* Indicates if the access control rule is inherited from a parent class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the access control rule */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the access control rule */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_control_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "compiler_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each compiler data structure */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "data_type" TEXT /* Type of the data */,
  "data_value" TEXT /* Value of the data */,
  "is_optimized" INTEGER /* Indicates if the data is optimized */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the compiler data */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the compiler data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compiler_data_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_compiler_data_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vtable" (
  "vtable_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each virtual table entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "vtable_index" INTEGER /* Index in the virtual table */,
  "is_overridden" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is overridden in a derived class */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the vtable entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the vtable entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vtable_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vtable_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vtable_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sizeof" (
  "sizeof_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sizeof entry */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "sizeof_value" INTEGER /* Size of the class or member */,
  "alignment" INTEGER /* Alignment of the class or member */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the sizeof entry */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the sizeof entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sizeof_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizeof_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sizeof_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "method_definitions" (
  "method_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each method definition */,
  "class_id" INTEGER /* ID of the class */,
  "member_id" INTEGER /* ID of the member */,
  "method_body" TEXT /* Body of the method */,
  "is_pure_virtual" INTEGER /* Indicates if the method is pure virtual */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the method definition */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the method definition */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("method_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_definitions_class_id FOREIGN KEY ("class_id") REFERENCES classes ("class_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_method_definitions_member_id FOREIGN KEY ("member_id") REFERENCES members ("member_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "aspect" (
  "aspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each aspect */,
  "aspect_name" TEXT /* Name of the aspect */,
  "aspect_type" TEXT /* Type of the aspect */,
  "required_in_class_definition" TEXT /* Whether the aspect is required in the class definition */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the aspect */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the aspect */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the aspect */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("aspect_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_aspect" (
  "user_aspect_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user-aspect relationship */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "aspect_id" INTEGER /* ID of the aspect */,
  "user_aspect_type" TEXT /* Type of user-aspect relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Creation timestamp of the user-aspect relationship */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Last update timestamp of the user-aspect relationship */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_aspect_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_aspect_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_aspect_aspect_id FOREIGN KEY ("aspect_id") REFERENCES aspect ("aspect_id")
)
